assertion_results.expected: Scope includes placo partition wall work.
assertion_results.actual:
Requested scope from contractor note is to create two showers in the changing/locker room area, build a 2 m high non-full-height placo partition wall, open an existing wall to access a 100 mm drainage connection, and install/connect a water heater. Drawing and photos provide context on layout uncertainty, low headroom, narrow access, and existing occupied conditions, but do not by themselves define additional requested work.
Create two shower installations changing room area two new showers
Build placo partition wall shower/changing room area new non-full-height partition wall at 2 m height
Open wall to access existing drainage existing wall 100 mm drainage connection
Install and connect water heater water supply/services location water heater and connected plumbing
Verify as-built layout, dimensions, openings, and service constraints on site before execution entire work area including room perimeter and access points confirmed installation layout and measurable quantities
placo partition wall system 2.0 m_height
100 mm drainage connection components 1.0 allowance
water heater 1.0 unit

placo partition wall system 2.0 m_height
100 mm drainage connection components 1.0 allowance
water heater 1.0 unit
Two showers are explicitly requested, but exact shower fixture specification and finish level are not defined.
The new placo wall is confirmed as 2 m high and not full height; wall length and exact position remain unknown and must be measured on site.
The scope relies on tying into an existing 100 mm drainage line reachable by opening an existing wall.
Drawing evidence is treated as layout/context only because dimensions, opening count, and symbols are not reliable enough for takeoff without confirmation.
Photos are treated as existing-condition context only and indicate pricing risks such as narrow access, low ceiling, mixed finishes, and occupied/cluttered conditions.

Requested scope from contractor note is to create two showers in the changing/locker room area, build a 2 m high non-full-height placo partition wall, open an existing wall to access a 100 mm drainage connection, and install/connect a water heater. Drawing and photos provide context on layout uncertainty, low headroom, narrow access, and existing occupied conditions, but do not by themselves define additional requested work.
Create two shower installations changing room area two new showers
Build placo partition wall shower/changing room area new non-full-height partition wall at 2 m height
Open wall to access existing drainage existing wall 100 mm drainage connection

placo partition wall system 2.0 m_height
100 mm drainage connection components 1.0 allowance
water heater 1.0 unit
must_have What is the required length and exact location of the new placo partition wall? Only the wall height is given; wall length and placement are needed for pricing and execution.
must_have What shower fixtures and construction elements are included for the two showers, such as trays or floor form, mixers, shower columns, screens, and drain arrangement? Two showers are requested, but fixture scope and build standard are missing for accurate pricing.
must_have Are waterproofing works for the shower area included in the scope? Wet-area compliance and pricing depend on whether waterproofing is required.
must_have Is wall opening and reinstatement limited to accessing the existing 100 mm drainage, and what wall type/finish must be repaired afterward? Demolition extent and making-good requirements directly affect labor, materials, and finish scope.
must_have What are the specifications of the water heater, including type, capacity, mounting location, and required electrical supply? Water heater selection and installation conditions are required for accurate pricing and trade coordination.
must_have What are the confirmed room dimensions, units, and exact positions of existing openings/doors in the work area? The sketch appears dimensioned but the values and opening interpretation are too uncertain for quantity takeoff and layout confirmation.
must_have Will the furniture, appliances, stored items, and other contents be removed before work starts? Photos show cluttered and narrow existing conditions that can materially affect access, protection, and productivity.
nice_to_have Are finishes for the new partition and repaired wall areas included, such as taping, plastering, painting, or tiling? The note mentions wall construction and opening but does not define final finish scope.
nice_to_have Please confirm whether the noted ceiling height is 2.60 m clear height across the work area. Likely yes from the sketch, but confirmation helps method planning and quantity assumptions in a low-headroom area.
